description: Grouped bar chart showing quarterly revenue for three product lines over fiscal year 2023.
Multi-line chart displaying average monthly temperatures across five major cities from January to December.
Pie chart showing the breakdown of federal budget allocation across defense, healthcare, education, infrastructure, and other categories.
Scatter plot with trend line showing the correlation between daily exercise duration and resting heart rate across 200 study participants.
Stacked area chart depicting CO2 emissions by sector (transportation, industry, residential, agriculture) from 2000 to 2023.
Heatmap showing model accuracy across different hyperparameter combinations (learning rate vs. batch size) with color intensity indicating F1 score.
Horizontal bar chart ranking the top 15 countries by GDP per capita with color-coded regions (Americas, Europe, Asia, Oceania).
Dual-axis chart showing stock price (line, left axis) and trading volume (bars, right axis) for a technology company over 12 months.
Infographic combining a choropleth map with bar charts showing population growth rates by state, with icons indicating urban vs. rural trends.
Donut chart with center annotation showing customer satisfaction survey results broken down by product category with percentage labels on each segment.
